remarks: Rare investment & owner-user opportunity on the market in the heart of downtown New Canaan. 93 Cherry St. is an approx. 3,200sqft commercial property strategically positioned in one of Fairfield County's most desirable & supply-constrained markets. Well-maintained asset brings immediate income, long-term flexibility & exceptional value for investors, professional users & developers seeking a premier downtown location. Property Highlights*Prime downtown New Canaan location w/exceptional walkability & visibility*Private 12-space paved off-street parking lot & w/non-metered on-street parking-a significant competitive advantage in the downtown core*Strong in-place leases providing immediate cash flow & investment stability*Flexible Business A (BUSA) zoning*Potential for expansion or adaptive reuse, subject to zoning approvals & investor research diligence*Well-maintained office space w/minimal anticipated near-term capital expenditures*Attractive opportunity for investors, medical users, professional office occupants & mixed-use developers*Recent commercial sales in the surrounding area continue to demonstrate strong demand for boutique assets in downtown New Canaan, particularly properties that combine private parking, stable tenancy & future redevelopment potential. Historically limited inventory & significant barriers to entry, 93 Cherry St presents a compelling opportunity to acquire a high-quality commercial asset in one of Connecticut's most sought-after downtown markets
